## Type of change

- [ ] Added — new feature or capability
- [ ] Changed — existing behavior modified in a user-visible way
- [ ] Fixed — bug fix
- [ ] Security — vulnerability fix, auth change, or exposure mitigation
- [ ] Internal — refactor, tests, CI, docs only (no changelog entry needed)

## User impact

Describe what changes for the end user. If this is an internal-only change, write "None."

## Changelog

- [ ] This change should be added to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No changelog entry needed (internal change)

If a changelog entry is needed, paste the line(s) below (ready to copy into the file):

```
-
```

## Release notes summary

One sentence for the next release description. Leave blank if not applicable.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Tested manually against a real cluster
- [ ] Tested with helper pod fallback path (container without shell)
- [ ] N/A
